arts.sum: Despite just two league wins since October, Lincoln are still firmly in the play-off race with the gap to sixth place just six points. The Imps are winless in their last seven meetings with Peterboro...

arts.ttl: Preview: Lincoln City vs. Peterborough United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Lincoln City and Peterborough United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
